buildCommand: prisma generate && prisma db push --skip-generate && next build

AUTH_SECRET.description: Auth.js secret key - generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

NEXTAUTH_URL.description: The canonical URL of the site (e.g., https://your-app.vercel.app)

headers.value: X-CSRF-Token, X-Requested-With, Accept, Accept-Version, Content-Length, Content-MD5, Content-Type, Date, X-Api-Version
